What we offer

Our Experiences

Every tour is built around you — your interests, your pace, your budget. No fixed groups, no rushing. Genuine cultural connection in some of Tanzania's most extraordinary communities.

🏹
Tribe Visit
Village Experience Bushmen
Spend a day with one of Africa's last hunter-gatherer tribes. Join a hunt, hear their ancient click language, share a fire. A rare window into a way of life unchanged for thousands of years.
Book this tour
🔨
Tribe Visit
Datoga Village
Meet the Datoga — skilled blacksmiths and proud pastoralists. Watch traditional metalwork, see their homesteads, and sit with elders who carry generations of oral history.
Book this tour
🐾
Cultural Safari
Authentic Village Experiences
Explore authentic cultural safaris with Village Experience and Datoga communities. Enjoy bush walks, traditional hunting experiences, birdwatching, storytelling, and overnight cultural stays guided by local experts.
Book this tour

“Your safari, built around you.”

Village Experience Visits

Birdwatching

Meet your guide

Rasuli
Hamisi Salimu

“I have spent years living alongside these tribes — eating with them, learning their languages, earning their trust. Now I want to share that world with you. Come and see Tanzania the way I see it.”

Rasuli is a Tanzanian-born cultural guide with deep roots in the communities around Lake Eyasi. He has spent years building genuine relationships with the Village Experience and Datoga peoples — not as an outsider looking in, but as a trusted friend who is always welcomed back.

His tours are not performances. They are real introductions to real people, made possible only because of the time and respect Rasuli has invested. Whether you are travelling solo, as a couple, or with family, he will sit down with you and build a trip that fits exactly what you are looking for.

Rasuli Hamisi Salimu
Founder · Cultural Safaris

Message Rasuli Now

“Every trip starts with a conversation.”

Tell Rasuli where you are coming from, when you plan to travel, how many people are in your group, and what excites you most. He will build the right plan — whether you want to camp under the stars with the Village Experience, join the Datoga for a day of metalwork, or watch the sun set over Lake Eyasi.

No fixed packages. No hidden costs. No rushing. Just an honest conversation about what is possible — and a trip you will never forget.
